description: Shawn: I'm proud of you man, not just standing up for that girl but for sticking it to your boss on your own behalf.

Shawn: All right, relax. I'm still proud of you.
Gus: You are?

Gus: I'm not touching a thing, Shawn. I don't need to. You know why? I'm innocent, and the truth shall set me free.
Shawn: Hurricane Carter, I'm proud of you.
Gus: I'm proud of me too.

Gus: But you know what I realized? No matter how it all plays out, Burton Guster is gonna be just fine.
Shawn: You know what? I'm proud of you.
Gus: Thank you.

Despereaux: You'll find me toiling away in obscurity in some dreary old office, no doubt.
Shawn: Hey. I'm proud of you.
Despereaux: Thank you.

Shawn: Now, you ready to do this?
Gus: No. What--
Shawn: I'm proud of you.

Shawn: Do you have your half of the beard?
Gus: Man, you know it's in the glove compartment.
Shawn: I'm proud of you.
Gus: I'm proud of you.
Shawn: Let's do this.

Shawn: Man, we got arrested.
Gus: It'll take a miracle for us to get out of here.
Shawn: Hey. I'm proud of you.

Gus: Hey. I'm proud of you.
Shawn: I'm proud of you. Quitting your job like that, all man-style.

Gus: She deserves the best version of you. Hey.
Shawn and Gus: I'm proud of you.
Shawn: Nice, babe. I'm proud of you.
